name: Applesauce Fudgies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter together.
2. Mix applesauce, eggs, sugar, and vanilla in a separate bowl.
3. Sift dry ingredients into the applesauce mixture.
4. Stir until blended; add melted chocolate and stir well.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan and sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Cut into 2-inch squares and cool in the pan on racks. Makes 16.
